posts.name: Yusuf Albana
posts.content:
Hi! 👋 I'm Yusuf, a passionate Frontend Developer with experience building responsive, fast, and accessible web applications.

I specialize in crafting solid UI architectures using modern tech stacks.

🛠️ Core Skills: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

I'm actively seeking full-time roles. Check out my projects below or let's connect! 👇

#HireMe #FrontendDeveloper #WebDev

posts.name: Yusuf Albana
posts.content:
🚀 Just launched a new feature-rich E-Commerce Web App!

Built entirely with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. It features a complete payment gateway integration via Stripe, real-time inventory tracking, and full SSR support for lightning-fast speeds.

🔗 Live Demo: store.example.com
👨‍💻 Github: github.com/yusufxalbana/ecommerce-nextjs

posts.name: Yusuf Albana
posts.content:
🎨 Modern SaaS Dashboard UI Kit

A beautifully crafted dashboard template utilizing Vanilla JS and Tailwind CSS. Focuses heavily on accessibility and aesthetic micro-interactions. Dark mode included natively! 

Features Chart.js integration and a modular component structure.

🔗 Preview: dash-ui.example.com

posts.name: Yusuf Albana
posts.content:
🧠 Wrote a comprehensive guide on Optimizing Core Web Vitals in React Applications.

Topics covered:
- Bundle chunking strategy
- Avoiding expensive re-renders
- Lazy loading images using Intersection Observer

Read the full article on my blog! 📖 #ReactJS #Performance

posts.name: Yusuf Albana
posts.content:
Developed a real-time collaborative task manager using MERN stack & Socket.io ⚡.

Users can drag-and-drop tasks, leave comments in real-time, and get notified of updates instantly without refreshing. A huge learning experience in handling WebSockets!

💻 check it out on my repo!
